message:
fix(convoy): count tracked externals in status and list

Convoy progress could show 0/0 when tracking cross-rig beads because
bd dep list misses external IDs that only appear in bd show dependencies.
Merge both sources to get the real tracked set.

Closes #2605

Co-Authored-By: Kirtan Gajjar <8456197+kirtangajjar@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
